changes.description: Created ReportService with SpendingByCategory method. Fetches expense entries with WithTransaction+WithCategory, aggregates by category, calculates percentages, sorts descending by total. Two tests: multi-category with equal spending and no-expenses case.

changes.task: Create income vs expense monthly trend query
changes.description: Added MonthlyTrend method to ReportService. Initializes all month slots with zeros, fetches entries with WithTransaction+WithAccount, aggregates income (negative amounts on income accounts) and expenses (positive amounts on expense accounts), calculates net per month. Test covers 3-month range with mixed data and zero-data month.

changes.task: Create dashboard summary query and wire all reports to GraphQL
changes.description: Added GetDashboardSummary: total asset balance, current-month income/spending via MonthlyTrend, safe-to-spend (balance minus remaining budget), last 10 transactions. Created report.graphqls with DashboardSummary, CategorySpend, MonthSummary types and three queries. Implemented resolvers calling ReportService. Wired ReportService into Resolver and main.go.
